narrative:
Paris Township has 19,229 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
